emails.subject: Trips
emails.body: Trips Do you still want to make the trip to Dallas for the Southwestern Legal Foundation on Friday, November 2? Travel to Austin for Trustees mtg. on the nights of Thursday, November 8, 9, 10 and checkout on 11th?

emails.subject: RE: Trips
emails.body: RE: Trips I have notified the Southwestern Legal Foundation that I will not be able to attend the November 2 meeting. To: Derrick Jr., James

emails.subject: RE: Trips
emails.body: RE: Trips I am not yet certain about the Austin trip. To: Derrick Jr., James
